description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:6.11.2 Docker image. Define three stages: lint-css, lint-js, unit-test. Add a lint css job in the lint-css stage that runs npm install as a before_script, then executes ./node_modules/gulp/bin/gulp.js lint-css, caches all untracked files, and runs only on the master branch. Add a lint js job in the lint-js stage that caches untracked files with pull policy, runs only on master, and executes ./node_modules/gulp/bin/gulp.js lint-js. Add a run unit test job in the unit-test stage that also caches untracked files with pull policy, runs only on master, and executes ./node_modules/gulp/bin/gulp.js test.
